.printOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:#fff;z-index:9999;overflow:auto;color:#000}.printBar{position:sticky;top:0;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #000;padding:8px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between}.printPage{width:194mm;min-height:281mm;margin:8px auto;padding:7mm;background:#fff}.printPage table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}.printPage th,.printPage td{border:1px solid #000;padding:4px}@media(max-width:720px){.wrap{padding:8px}.topGrid,.filterGrid,.searchLine,.summary,.sendBar{grid-template-columns:1fr}.tabs{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.title{font-size:15px}.sendLabel{grid-template-columns:1fr}.tbl{min-width:540px}.p small{font-size:11px}.devTeamBtn{position:absolute;right:12px;top:10px;width:118px;height:38px;font-size:15.5px}.devPerson{grid-template-columns:1fr 128px;gap:10px;padding:12px}.devInfo b{font-size:17px}.devCode,.devRole{font-size:13px}.devPhotoFrame{height:112px;border-width:5px}}@media print{body>*:not(.printOverlay){display:none!important}.printOverlay{position:static}.printBar{display:none}.printPage{width:auto;min-height:auto;margin:0;padding:0}}.orderTab,.orderTab.on{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fb7185 0%,#e11d48 58%,#9f1239 100%)!important;box-shadow:0 3px 0 #7f1d1d,0 6px 10px rgba(159,18,57,.28),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.48)!important;color:#fff!important}.modeTop{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr auto!important;gap:8px!important;align-items:start!important}.modeTop .tabs{grid-column:1/-1!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:6px!important;margin:8px 0 0!important}.modeTop .tab{height:34px!important;min-width:0!important;padding:0 4px!important;border-radius:10px!important;font-size:12.5px!important;line-height:1.05!important;white-space:normal!important}.tableTitleBox{min-width:0}@media(max-width:720px){.modeTop{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}.modeTop #displayActionButtons{grid-column:1/-1!important}.modeTop .tabs{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))!important}.modeTop .tab{height:34px!important;font-size:12px!important;padding:0 3px!important}}</style></head><body><header class="topbar"><a class="back" href="/">← กลับหน้าแรก</a><div class="title">AYA By.พี่ฐาสั่งลุยย</div><button class="fileBtn settingsGear" id="diagBtn" id="donePct">0%</strong><div class="barline"><i id="doneBar"></i></div></div></section><section class="card tableCard"><div class="tableTop modeTop"><div class="tableTitleBox"><h3>รายการถอดของ</h3><div id="tableCount" class="hint">โหลดไฟล์เพื่อแสดงข้อมูล</div></div><button class="outline" id="displayBtn">ปรับจำนวนแสดง</button><div class="tabs"><button บันทึกอัตโนมัติ</button></div></section></main><div id="drawerShade" class="drawerShade"></div><div id="teleDrawer" class="drawer"><div class="drawerHead"><b id="drawerTitle">บิล Telesale</b><button class="fileBtn" id="closeDrawer">ปิด</button></div><div class="drawerBody" id="drawerBody"></div></div><div id="pickShade" class="pickShade"><div class="pickPanel"><div class="pickHead"><b id="pickTitle">เลือก</b><button class="fileBtn" id="pickClose">ปิด</button></div><div id="pickList" class="pickList"></div><div class="pickFoot"><button id="pickClear">ล้าง</button><button id="pickAll">เลือกทั้งหมด</button><button id="pickOk" class="ok">ตกลง</button></div></div></div><div id="devTeamModal" class="devModal" onclick="if(event.target===this)this.classList.remove('on')"><div class="devPanel"><div class="devHead"><span>ทีมพัฒนา</span><button class="devClose" onclick="document.getElementById('devTeamModal').classList.remove('on')">ปิด</button></div><div class="devBody"><div class="devPerson"><div class="devInfo"><b>ฐากูร อุปมัย</b><span class="devCode">DSHFSAYA</span><div class="devRole">ผู้ควบคุมงาน/หัวหน้าสั่งการ</div></div><div class="devPhotoFrame"><img id="teamThakoonPro" alt="ฐากูร อุปมัย"><div class="noPhoto" id="teamThakoonNoPhoto">ยังไม่มีรูป</div></div></div><div class="devPerson"><div class="devInfo"><b>นาย อรรถวิทย์ ชัยชะนะ</b><span class="devCode">AYAADS01</span><div class="devRole">ที่ปรึกษา/แอดมิน</div></div><div class="devPhotoFrame"><img id="teamAtthawitPro" alt="นาย อรรถวิทย์ ชัยชะนะ"><div class="noPhoto" id="teamAtthawitNoPhoto">ยังไม่มีรูป</div></div></div><div class="devPerson"><div class="devInfo"><b>นาย ฉัตรชัย จันทร์กลิ่น</b><span class="devCode">AYAPS062</span><div class="devRole">ผู้สร้าง/จัดทำ</div></div><div class="devPhotoFrame"><img id="teamChatchaiPro" alt="นาย ฉัตรชัย จันทร์กลิ่น"><div class="noPhoto" id="teamChatchaiNoPhoto">ยังไม่มีรูป</div></div></div></div></div></div><script>const TEAM_FN='https://saodmeoilixfdqentofp.supabase.co/functions/v1/team-photo/';const TEAM_PUBLIC='https://saodmeoilixfdqentofp.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/doit-files/team/';function showTeamSources(id,noId,sources){const img=document.getElementById(id),no=document.getElementById(noId);if(!img)return;let i=0;if(no)no.style.display='flex';img.style.display='none';img.onload=()=>{img.style.display='block';if(no)no.style.display='none'};img.onerror=()=>{i++;if(i<sources.length){img.src=sources[i]}else{img.style.display='none';if(no)no.style.display='flex'}};img.src=sources[0]}function loadTeamOne(id,noId,key,file){const t=Date.now();const src=[];const local=localStorage.getItem('doit-team-photo-'+key+'-dataurl');if(local&&local.startsWith('data:image/'))src.push(local);src.push(TEAM_FN+key+'?t='+t);src.push(TEAM_PUBLIC+file+'?t='+t);showTeamSources(id,noId,src)}function loadTeamPhotos(){loadTeamOne('teamThakoonPro','teamThakoonNoPhoto','thakoon','team-thakoon.jpg');loadTeamOne('teamAtthawitPro','teamAtthawitNoPhoto','atthawit','team-atthawit.jpg');loadTeamOne('teamChatchaiPro','teamChatchaiNoPhoto','chatchai','team-chatchai.jpg')}function openDevTeamModal(){document.getElementById('devTeamModal').classList.add('on');loadTeamPhotos()}document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',loadTeamPhotos);</script><script src="/assets/pro-core-v4.js?v=358"></script><footer style="background:#087b34;color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:12px;font-size:12px;margin-top:20px">AYA By.พี่ฐาสั่งลุยย</footer></body></html>
